## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Visited each cited source URL and confirmed the proposed value
- [ ] Tamil translations (where changed) read naturally — not machine-translated
- [ ] No unintended diffs outside the competition markdown files
- [ ] `CONTENT_LOG.md` entry appended with this run's summary
- [ ] `last_verified` updated on every checked competition (changed or not)
